description: You are a social media coordinator preparing a brand campaign video (/home/ga/Videos/brand_campaign.mp4) for multi-platform distribution. Using the content brief at /home/ga/Documents/content_brief.txt, generate a social media package in /home/ga/Videos/social_package/ containing: four 10-second highlight clips, vertical (9:16) versions of each highlight, a concatenated compilation of the landscape highlights, an MP3 audio extraction of the compilation, thumbnail images from the midpoint of each highlight, and a JSON manifest of all assets. Ensure all deliverables follow the filenames, formats, and resolutions specified in the brief.
